{{Quote|Durni are small creatures that live mainly on the planet Corellia. They shed their fur quite often which then accumulates into balls of hair. Many people think dust balls in their homes look like these balls of fur, hence the name Dust Durni.|[[Yawse Felsiy]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:DD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Dust Durni}}</ref>}}
The '''durni''' was an eyeless [[Lagomorph|rabbit-like]] species that used a sonic radar to navigate the wilderness they live in.<ref name="SWG:TGIC" /> This small creature lived underground in the old [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] tunnels of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

A slang term in use in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was [[dust durni]], which was used to refer to a large pile of dust.<ref name="SWG:DD" />

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Maldien]] conducted illegal and highly dangerous [[bioengineering]] experiments in a [[Illegal Lab (Corellia)|laboratory]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to create very aggressive and intelligent creatures. This included engineered durnis.<ref name="SWG:CMCOtZ">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Coronet Murmurs: Clear Out the Zoo|Corellia}}</ref>

Around the same time, fiendish durnis overran an [[Abandoned Bunker|abandoned bunker]] near [[Kor Vella/Legends|Kor Vella]]. The scientist [[Lejo Daramus]] paid the spacer to rid the place of the creatures in order to use the place to conduct his research.<ref name="SWG:VB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Vermin Bunker|Corellia}}</ref>

During the Galactic Civil War, the man known as [[Galvain Tark]] trained three durnis as racing durnis. At some point they were stolen by the criminals of the [[Chirq Council]] but they were finally recovered by a spacer.<ref name="SWG:RtSRD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Recover the Stolen Racing Durni|Corellia}}</ref>

The [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Carson Vance]] owned a pet Durni, which was called [[Peaches]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Durni_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Durni appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
